articles.title: Running out of time on Clarity: State of Crypto
articles.description: April is almost over. May is the month to watch.

articles.title: Litecoin gives post-attack update, but other devs doubt zero-day theory
articles.description: Valid transactions that occurred during the affected blocks were not impacted and remain on the main chain, the Litecoin development team said.

articles.title: Aave raises nearly 80% of the $200 million it needs to cover bad debt left by Kelp DAO exploit
articles.description: Blockchain analytics platform Arkham said that the largest contributors are Mantle and Aave DAO, having raised a combined $127 million.

articles.title: Why DeFi isn't dead despite massive exploits and $13 billion investor exodus
articles.description: A $292 million exploit and $13 billion TVL drop looks catastrophic on the surface, but the data tells a different story.

articles.title: Bitcoin whales build long positions as funding stays deeply negative
articles.description: Long bias from the largest perpetual traders on Hyperliquid has built steadily through February, March and April, with the position now leaning aggressively long as bitcoin tags $80,000 and US-Iran talks resume.

articles.title: Freezing 5.6 million dormant bitcoin could trigger ‘worst’ single-day repricing
articles.description: Maximalists warn freezing 5.6M BTC risks instant sell-offs, while others say quantum threats leave no alternative.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Market conditions force 1 in 3 crypto traders to cut everyday spending: Survey
articles.description: More than a third of US crypto traders report cutting daily expenses and delaying major purchases as unrealized losses weigh on household finances.

articles.title: Only 3% of traders drive prediction markets' accuracy, not the crowd, study finds
articles.description: Researchers show market accuracy comes from a tiny group of informed traders, not broad participation.

articles.title: MiCA's not enough: Bybit CEO says firms need other licenses to turn a profit in Europe
articles.description: In an interview, Ben Zhou said the crypto exchange is at least two years away from breaking even in Europe.

articles.title: Coinbase's John D’Agostino says crypto platform stands alone as industry's full-service prime broker
articles.description: The exchange’s institutional arm has quietly assembled trading, custody, financing, derivatives and cross margining into a single stack, something its rivals still piece together.

articles.title: Ethereum Foundation unstakes 17K ETH after nearing 70K staked ETH milestone
articles.description: The Ethereum Foundation unstaked over 17,000 ETH worth $40M shortly after approaching its 70,000 ETH staking target.

articles.title: Trump’s official memecoin extends slide as he hosts exclusive investor gala
articles.description: TRUMP memecoin fell nearly 10% in 24 hours despite a Mar-a-Lago investor gala, with the token still down over 96% from its peak.

articles.title: Litecoin hit by denial-of-service attack, rewrites 13 blocks to reverse effect
articles.description: Litecoin's foundation called the weekend exploit a zero-day. The litecoin-project GitHub repository shows the consensus vulnerability was privately patched between March 19 and 26, more than four weeks before the attack.

articles.title: 助 Anthropic 擴充算力，Google 承諾挹注資金上看 400 億美元
